description_long: This mobile phone features a large, edge-to-edge display with a prominent notch at the top housing sensors and a front-facing camera. The back of the device is decorated with a bold red and black checkerboard pattern, giving it a distinctive and stylish appearance. Dual rear cameras are positioned horizontally in the top left corner, accompanied by a flash. The phone's body is slim and appears to be constructed from a combination of glass and metal, with visible side buttons for power and volume control. The rear also includes a circular fingerprint sensor located centrally. The overall design is modern, with a focus on both aesthetics and functionality.
description: A slim, modern mobile phone with a large notched display and a red-black checkerboard patterned back, featuring dual rear cameras and a central fingerprint sensor.
description_view_0: Front and back of the phone are visible; the front shows a vibrant display with a notch, while the back reveals the checkerboard pattern, dual cameras, and fingerprint sensor.
description_view_1: Side profile of the phone, highlighting its slimness and showing the placement of side buttons.
description_view_2: Similar to view 0, showing both the display and the patterned back with camera and fingerprint sensor details.
description_view_3: Another side profile, mirroring view 1, emphasizing the thinness and button placement.
attribute_brand_logo: The back of the phone features a logo in the center, partially visible and appearing to be embossed or printed in a subtle, dark color.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a colorful, abstract wallpaper with swirling hues of orange, purple, and blue. No icons, widgets, or notifications are visible, suggesting the phone is on the lock or home screen with minimal interface elements.
attribute_camera_placement: There are two rear camera lenses arranged horizontally in the top left corner of the back, accompanied by a flash module. The front-facing camera is housed within the notch at the top center of the display.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are visible on the right edge of the phone, likely serving as the power button and volume rocker. The buttons are slim and elongated.
attribute_case_or_cover_design: The phone has a fitted external case with a red and black checkerboard pattern, covering the back and sides. The case appears to be made of plastic or silicone and fits snugly around the device.
